description: MCP server for E.Leclerc Drive — search products, manage cart, and order groceries from Claude
name: io.github.skunkobi/leclerc-drive

environmentVariables.description: Leclerc Drive store id, e.g. 053701 (defaults to 053701).
environmentVariables.name: LECLERC_STORE_ID

environmentVariables.description: Backend host for your store, e.g. fd9-courses.leclercdrive.fr (the fdN prefix varies by region).
environmentVariables.name: LECLERC_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Optional raw Cookie header override for headless hosts; by default the session is read from your local Chrome profile.
environmentVariables.name: LECLERC_COOKIE

environmentVariables.description: Chrome profile directory to read the session cookie from (defaults to "Default").
environmentVariables.name: LECLERC_CHROME_PROFILE
